name: Information Services Group Inc.
business: ISG is a global AI-centered technology research and advisory firm. It serves more than 900 clients, including 75 of the world’s top 100 enterprises, helping them maximize the value of their technology investments. The firm provides digital transformation and technology advisory services to both private- and public-sector clients globally.

exposures.sentence: ISG is a global AI-centered technology research and advisory firm.

catalysts.sentence: our most recent acquisition of Martino & Partners s.r.l. (Martino & Partners), a strategic advisory firm serving public and private sector clients in Italy, on September 1, 2025
In another move to expand our capabilities, we acquired the AI Maturity Index in January this year.

tamClaims.claim: Global software spending expected to double to more than $1.4 trillion by end of 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Software continues to be a significant spend category for enterprises, with global spending expected to double to more than $1.4 trillion by end of 2030, with AI as a catalyst.
